claimCeiling: candidate_only; a decidable-band reclaim result, not a capability claim
honestBound: Measured locally with z3 present. Labels are first-principles and independent of agent.smt_verifier (dimensional equality / exhaustive bounded enumeration / exact rational containment). Frozen set is deterministic (seed 0), no tuning. To reproduce in CI, install requirements-smt.txt. canClaimAGI stays false; this reclaims a narrow decidable band (unit/dimension, bounded-int, interval), NOT general reasoning.
